arts.ttl: Liverpool eye three Trent Alexander-Arnold replacements as Real Madrid increasingly confident of transfer
arts.sum: Liverpool are understood to be preparing for life without star right-back Trent Alexander-Arnold as they eye up Jeremie Frimpong, Vanderson and Michael Kayode as potential transfer targets in that position. arts.ttl: Iconic Performances: Beckham’s Greece goal earns England redemption
arts.sum: David Beckham’s career contained a catalogue of defining moments. From an early emergence as part of Fergie’s Fledglings at Manchester United, to treble success with the club in the late nineties and a Galactico move to Spain in the new millennium. Beckham was box-office. A ground-breaker. arts.ttl: England vs Greece: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Fotis Ioannidis is Greece's regular starting striker and scored three goals in the two games against the Republic of Ireland and Finland but he's not expected to feature against England due to an adductor injury. England's Nations League campaign continues on Thursday night as they aim to take top spot in Group 2 of League B off upcoming opponents Greece.
